name: codex-orchestration
description: Keep the current Codex model in charge, add an optional plan reviewer, and steer eligible work to efficient executors.

interface.shortDescription: Optional plan reviewer plus efficient executors
interface.longDescription: Keep the current task model as Codex's orchestrator, optionally review non-trivial plans through a root-facing advisor, and steer suitable Codex subagent work to an efficient executor.
defaultPrompt: /codex-orchestration executor: GPT-5.6 Luna xhigh, advisor: none — inspect this project and suggest the next useful task.
$codex-orchestration:codex-orchestration ask me for an executor and optional advisor.
$codex-orchestration:codex-orchestration executor: GPT-5.6 Luna xhigh, advisor: none, save for this project.
